criteria.evidence: tasks ran with tmp fixture writes: 8

criteria.description: Positive pass rate on real-file tasks

limitations: No LLM-generated code edits were tested; all file mutations are mechanical string replacements.
First-pass rate measures mechanical correctness only, not semantic code quality.
8-task benchmark pack is too small for statistical confidence.
Retry-loop evidence remains limited; P9 measures first-pass baseline only.
